description: Deterministic long-context target that exceeds the configured chunk budget and declares the facts an RLM completion must retain after bounded truncation.

lines: FACT:LC-001 command isolation is mandatory: ooo rlm is the only allowed entrypoint for this recursive run.
filler-001 deterministic padding for the first retained chunk.
FACT:LC-002 Hermes must be invoked through execute_task_to_result with an empty tools list.
filler-002 deterministic padding for the second retained chunk.
FACT:LC-003 the AC tree depth cap is 5 and the ambiguity threshold is 0.2.
filler-003 deterministic padding for the third retained chunk.
FACT:LC-004 trace replay must link rlm_node_id, ac_node_id, call_id, and parent_call_id.
filler-004 deterministic padding for the fourth retained chunk.
FACT:LC-005 overflow fact beyond the truncation budget: tail evidence must not be claimed as retained.
filler-005 deterministic overflow padding that should be omitted.
FACT:LC-006 overflow fact beyond the truncation budget: unselected chunks must not appear in completion evidence.
filler-006 deterministic overflow padding that should be omitted.

recursive_run.initial_prompt: Analyze the long-context truncation fixture recursively, cite every retained fact, and report the truncation boundary without claiming omitted facts.

initial_state.root_ac_content: Analyze the long-context truncation fixture recursively, cite every retained fact, and report the truncation boundary without claiming omitted facts.

expected_retained_facts.text: FACT:LC-001 command isolation is mandatory: ooo rlm is the only allowed entrypoint for this recursive run.
FACT:LC-002 Hermes must be invoked through execute_task_to_result with an empty tools list.
FACT:LC-003 the AC tree depth cap is 5 and the ambiguity threshold is 0.2.
FACT:LC-004 trace replay must link rlm_node_id, ac_node_id, call_id, and parent_call_id.

expected_omitted_facts.text: FACT:LC-005 overflow fact beyond the truncation budget: tail evidence must not be claimed as retained.
FACT:LC-006 overflow fact beyond the truncation budget: unselected chunks must not appear in completion evidence.

completion_requirements.description: A valid completion must cite every retained fact by using evidence from the selected chunk IDs only.
A valid completion must not claim facts that live beyond the retained truncation boundary.
